name: Corn Meal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 2 1/2-inch muffin cups.
2. Heat oven to 425 degrees F (220 C).
3. In a medium-sized bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
4. Add the cornmeal and stir until well combined.
5. In a small bowl, beat the eggs with a fork. Add milk and oil.
6. Pour all at once into the dry ingredients and stir only until the dry ingredients are moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
7. Fill each prepared muffin cup 1/2 to 2/3 full with batter using a tablespoon.
8. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the oven and serve hot with butter, bacon, and eggs.
